category_sources: source_facts.description says CLI for interacting with Grafana Mimir; official Grafana docs describe Mimirtool as a command-line tool for Grafana Mimir and Grafana Cloud Metrics.
display_name_sources: Official Grafana documentation title is Grafana Mimirtool; source_facts.name is mimirtool.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is an official Grafana Mimirtool documentation URL; official docs describe installation, configuration, and commands.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/grafana/mimir, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Grafana Mimir interaction; official Grafana docs list commands for Mimir, Grafana Cloud Metrics, Prometheus rules, and remote read.
